questionHtml:
The temperature of an object is changed from θ1 °C to θ2 °C. What is the change in temperature measured in kelvin?


A.  (θ2 − θ1)

B.  (θ2 − θ1) + 273

C.  (θ2 − θ1) − 273

D.  273 − (θ2 − θ1)
